# Project README

A short paragraph that introduces the project. It links to the
[homepage](https://example.com/home) and the [docs section](#docs).

## Docs

This section uses underscored _emphasis_ and asterisked **strong** text, matching
dprint's configured style.

```js
const answer = 42;
```
